forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KW264DJC1A7J6M54MZC0E9S5
+- 01KW263S53NJ1YWNHGPYTTWEEC
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: b180
+project: expect
+title: 'Scoped ACP session per expectation: goal-only driver + structured capture'
+---
+## What
+The agent runtime fallback: when a mechanical step needs interpretation, delegate exploration to one scoped ACP session per expectation — but withhold the criteria. Per `ideas/expect.md` §"The Check Loop" hardening rules 1-2 and §"What ACP does not give us".
+
+- In `crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/drive.rs` (extending the agent seam): the "subagent per expectation" abstraction — open one `session/new`, send the GOAL only, drain `session/update`, read `stopReason`, tear down.
+- **Criteria withheld from the driver**: the prompt contains intent + `Given` + `When` ONLY. The `Then` checklist and `Notes`/right-reason text are withheld and routed to the grader at prompt-assembly (the SWE-bench held-out-test discipline; main defense against reward-hacking). Implement the split at prompt assembly.
+- **Structured capture**: the driver's self-declared result is captured via a forced `StructuredOutput`-style tool call (the contract doesn't exist yet — implement as prompt-for-JSON + the tolerant `extract_json_value` from validators, re-exported). The captured output is a CLAIM, never the observation — the adapter's authoritative read remains ground truth.
+- Integrate with `observe`: the agent path produces the same `Observation`/`Checkpoint` timeline (adapter still observes authoritative state); the agent only supplies the mechanical actions the cli adapter couldn't resolve.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] The driver prompt for an expectation contains intent + Given + When and does NOT contain any `Then` criterion or `Notes` text (assert by inspecting the assembled prompt).
+- [ ] One ACP `session/new` per expectation, drained to `stopReason`, then torn down.
+- [ ] The agent's structured result is parsed via `extract_json_value` and stored in `Trajectory` as a claim; the `Observation` checkpoints come from the adapter, not the claim.
+- [ ] On a deterministic cli expectation, the agent is NOT invoked (mechanical path stays default).
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Test asserting prompt assembly withholds criteria (intent+G+W present, Then absent).
+- [ ] Stub-agent test: a session returns malformed-then-fenced JSON; `extract_json_value` recovers it; the claim lands in Trajectory while checkpoints come from the (stub) adapter.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect driver` passes.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,6 +1,17 @@
 ---
 assignees:
 - claude-code
+comments:
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw3h52wm4kkg5qjxmhwatf30
+  text: |-
+    Picked up. Research done. Plan:
+    - drive.rs: add build_driver_goal(&Expectation)->String — assembles narrative-intent + Given + When from the body, withholding the Then checklist and Notes section by construction (reuses spec::Section + parse_criterion to drop Then/Notes/criteria). Appends a prompt-for-JSON structured-output instruction.
+    - Add GoalDriver trait (RPITIT, no async_fn_in_trait lint) returning the subagent's structured claim (serde_json::Value); AcpGoalDriver bridges existing run_expect_over_agent (one scoped session per expectation, single-use handle).
+    - Add observe_with_driver(expectation, adapter, config, driver): gates on SurfaceAdapter::resolves_mechanically (new default-true method); deterministic cli -> agent NOT invoked; otherwise drives the goal, records the claim in Trajectory (claim:-prefixed step), checkpoints always from the adapter's observe().
+    - spec::Section/from_heading -> pub(crate); SurfaceAdapter::resolves_mechanically default true (cli inherits => never invokes agent).
+    Tests in drive.rs: (1) prompt withholds criteria/notes; (2) one session/new per expectation to stopReason+teardown (strengthen EchoAgent test); (3) EchoAgent emits malformed-then-fenced JSON -> recovered via extract_json_value -> claim in Trajectory while checkpoints come from stub adapter; (4) deterministic cli expectation does not invoke the agent.
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T03:14:43.732118+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW264DJC1A7J6M54MZC0E9S5
 - 01KW263S53NJ1YWNHGPYTTWEEC

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -12,6 +12,27 @@
     - spec::Section/from_heading -> pub(crate); SurfaceAdapter::resolves_mechanically default true (cli inherits => never invokes agent).
     Tests in drive.rs: (1) prompt withholds criteria/notes; (2) one session/new per expectation to stopReason+teardown (strengthen EchoAgent test); (3) EchoAgent emits malformed-then-fenced JSON -> recovered via extract_json_value -> claim in Trajectory while checkpoints come from stub adapter; (4) deterministic cli expectation does not invoke the agent.
   timestamp: 2026-06-27T03:14:43.732118+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01kw3hp7ea7yet4mkhzersj30z
+  text: |-
+    Implemented and green. Verification:
+    - cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect -E 'test(drive) or test(driver)': 15 passed.
+    - cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-expect: 112 passed, 0 failed.
+    - cargo check --workspace: ok. cargo fmt applied. cargo clippy -p swissarmyhammer-expect --all-targets -D warnings: clean.
+    - TDD RED confirmed by mutation: disabling the Then/Notes/criteria withholding makes driver_goal_carries_intent_given_when_and_withholds_then_and_notes fail (criterion text leaks), then reverted to GREEN.
+
+    Files changed:
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/drive.rs — build_driver_goal (+ withhold_criteria) is the criteria-withholding prompt-assembly split; GoalDriver trait (RPITIT, no async_fn_in_trait), AcpGoalDriver (one scoped session per expectation over run_expect_over_agent), DriverHandle, observe_with_driver (adapter checkpoints + claim-in-trajectory), format_claim_step; 4 new tests + strengthened session-count assertion.
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/spec.rs — Section + Section::from_heading made pub(crate) for reuse by the split.
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/surface/mod.rs — SurfaceAdapter::resolves_mechanically default-true (cli inherits => deterministic => agent never invoked).
+    - crates/swissarmyhammer-expect/src/lib.rs — re-exports.
+
+    Criteria-withholding split: build_driver_goal reads only expectation.intent + Given/When; withhold_criteria walks the body once (reusing Section + parse_criterion), dropping the Then/Notes sections and any GFM checklist line wherever it appears, and never reads expectation.criteria/notes. Tested with a fixture whose intent/Given/When/Then/Notes each carry a unique marker: goal contains the first three, none of the last two.
+
+    Advisory double-check verdict: PASS. One non-blocking note (acceptable, downstream): when needs_agent is true, observe_with_driver still mechanically drives every When step via observe(); this is harmless today (cli always resolves mechanically => needs_agent never true in production) and the richer per-step agent/adapter interleaving is explicitly deferred to the observe-over-agent pipeline per the drive.rs docs and this card's scope.
+
+    Left in doing for /review.
+  timestamp: 2026-06-27T03:24:05.450761+00:00
 depends_on:
 - 01KW264DJC1A7J6M54MZC0E9S5
 - 01KW263S53NJ1YWNHGPYTTWEEC
